## Scope

## Safety

- [ ] No private keys, tokens, deployment scripts, server IPs, or machine-specific files are included.
- [ ] Review ownership was checked for the changed surface, if high risk.
- [ ] User-facing copy is routed through i18n where applicable.
- [ ] Trust boundary and asset impact were checked against the public NiceChunk threat model, if high risk.
- [ ] Protocol, worldgen, or account-layout impact is documented, if relevant.
